name: The Omelette (Mf)
recipeIngredient: ---or other filling like smoked salmon and ricotta cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with a fork. Season with a pinch of salt and pepper. Add any fresh herbs you would like to include.
2. Melt the butter in an omelet pan or nonstick 7-inch pan with sloping sides. Tilt the pan from side to side to coat the bottom with melted butter. When the butter is about to turn brown, add the eggs to the skillet.
3. Over high heat, stir the eggs with your right hand while you shake the pan back and forth, up and down, with your left hand using a gentle motion.
4. When the underside of the omelet begins to set, tilt the pan so that any uncooked egg from the top runs under the cooked portion to help it set.
5. Run a line of grated cheese down the middle of the omelet.
6. Hold the right top or side third of the omelet towards the center, then roll it over onto the other third.
7. Use your right hand to grasp the handle of the omelet pan and carefully roll the omelette onto a plate.
Yield: 1 serving
